name: Stats Row
description: A horizontal grid of stat cards showing key metrics at a glance. Commonly used at the top of dashboards to give users an immediate overview of important numbers.
whenToUse: At the top of dashboard pages to show key metrics
To summarize counts, totals, or status breakdowns
When users need quick numeric insights before diving into details

components.name: GoabText
components.usage: size='heading-xl' for numbers, size='body-s' for labels

structure.layout: CSS Grid with auto-fit for responsive columns
structure.cardStyle: White background, subtle shadow, rounded corners

example.description: Dashboard stats row showing case counts with color-coded alerts

variants.name: With color-coded values
variants.description: Use color prop on GoabText to highlight concerning numbers (emergency for high values, important for warnings)

variants.name: With icons
variants.description: Add GoabIcon before each label for visual distinction

variants.name: Clickable cards
variants.description: Wrap in a clickable container to navigate to filtered views

considerations: Keep to 4-5 stats maximum to avoid overwhelming users
Use semantic colors (emergency, important) sparingly for genuinely concerning values
Consider mobile layout - grid will stack cards automatically
Stats should link to filtered views when clicked (common pattern)
